prd.title: Distill v0.9.1 — Audit Cleanup (Security + Dead Code + CI)

stories.title: Remove the DISTILL_LEGACY_EXECUTOR env var and the legacy executor code path
Block .constructor( chain in the static analyzer
Add git config and related write commands to the git blocklist
Enforce isSymbolicLink checks in all directory walkers
Re-validate paths at file-open time, not only at validation time
Delete unused utility and analytics modules
stories.notes: Partial execution: deleted session-tracker.ts, toon-serializer.ts + test, output-estimator.ts + test, output-similarity.ts, project-detector.ts, command-normalizer.ts. Kept error-normalizer.ts — PRD audit premise was wrong; it is transitively used by utils/signature-grouper.ts (which is consumed by tools/auto-optimize.ts:21,327-329 for log deduplication). Same deviation pattern as US-008 (scoring/clustering/pattern-extraction kept). Follow-up story needed to either refactor signature-grouper off error-normalizer or formally accept both as kept.

stories.title: Delete unwired summarizers/ advanced modules and empty config/ directory
stories.notes: Partial execution: deleted hierarchical.ts + hierarchical.test.ts + src/config/. Kept scoring.ts, clustering.ts, pattern-extraction.ts — PRD audit premise was wrong; these are transitively used by genericSummarizer -> auto_optimize + sandbox/sdk/compress. Follow-up story needed to refactor generic.ts then delete.

stories.title: Remove packages/ui/, starter artefacts, and orphan turbo.json config
Add typecheck, test, and build jobs to CI
Enforce Vitest coverage thresholds
stories.notes: Initial floors set to baseline-2pts per PRD unhappy-path: lines 64, branches 51, functions 65, statements 63. Targets 75/70/75/75. Baseline: 66.95/53.81/68.22/66.15.

stories.title: Add knip CI check to prevent dead-code regression
stories.notes: Gate established with knip v6.5.0 + 5th CI job. Initial allowlist documents intentional API surface (AST queries/utils, dual-API pattern files, back-compat shim, summarizer scoring/clustering used transitively). Follow-up stories will reduce the allowlist as US-007/US-008 deviations and US-013/US-014 land.

stories.title: Inline the middleware chain into the tool registry
stories.notes: Deleted middleware/{chain,types,logging,index}.ts (313 LOC). Inlined verbose-mode logging in ToolRegistry.execute as two `if (verbose)` blocks (before + after try/catch, so error path still logs). Dropped `middleware` field from ServerInstance. Moved ToolContext/ToolResult types to registry.ts. Updated index.ts barrel (explicit type re-exports). Updated CLAUDE.md (§ Tool Registry replaces § Middleware). 998 tests pass, check-types clean, knip clean, build green.

stories.title: Fix or remove broken branded-types runtime guards
stories.notes: Chose AC option (b) deletion: removed 4 identical-`typeof === string` runtime guards (isValidatedPath, isSafePattern, isSanitizedGitArg, isSanitizedCode) from branded-types.ts — zero call sites existed. Branded types + brand functions + unwrapBrandedString preserved. Added SanitizedCode @ts-expect-error to type-tests.ts for symmetry with the other 3 brands. Updated knip.jsonc comment. 998 tests pass, check-types clean, knip clean, build green.

stories.title: Deduplicate parseLogLine — compressors use the utils implementation
stories.notes: Deleted local parseLogLine + its sole callers (extractTimestamp, extractLogLevel, LOG_LEVELS, LogLevel alias, ParsedLogLine). Compressor now imports parseLogLine from utils/log-parser.ts — same function the 4 summarizers consume. Level checks switched from uppercase ("ERROR"|"FATAL") to lowercase ("error"), which is strictly more permissive: utils folds FATAL/CRITICAL/ERR into error and WARN/WARNING into warning (previous local parser missed CRITICAL and ERR entirely). normalizeLogMessage kept local — it's a separate function with compressor-specific output format. Added logs.test.ts with 3 regression tests: shape parity, error/warning count parity between compressor and generic summarizer, and the CRITICAL/ERR/FATAL classification guarantee. 1001 tests pass, typecheck clean, knip clean, build green.

stories.title: Truth-up CLAUDE.md, ROADMAP.md, and add a CHANGELOG.md
stories.notes: Created root CHANGELOG.md (keep-a-changelog 1.1.0) with entries for v0.6.0-beta, v0.7.0-beta, v0.8.0, v0.8.1, v0.9.0, and draft v0.9.1 documenting DISTILL_LEGACY_EXECUTOR removal as BREAKING + sandbox hardening + dead-code purge + CI restoration. CLAUDE.md: corrected CI claim (4→5 parallel jobs with knip), reconciled packages/shared description to match current export {} state with forward reference to US-017, Anti-Friction Rules preserved untouched. ROADMAP.md: Phase 1 table rewritten around the 3-tool architecture; deprecated tool names (browse_tools, run_tool, summarize_logs, diff_compress, plus the 6 others consolidated in v0.9.0) moved to a Legacy note. Moved RELEASE_NOTES_v0.6.0-beta.md + RELEASE_NOTES_v0.8.0.md under docs/releases/ (git mv to preserve history); CHANGELOG now links to them. Also fixed a pre-existing JSON defect in this status file (missing `},` delimiter between US-015 and US-016). Lint / check-types / knip all green.

stories.title: Reconcile packages/shared with its actual usage (repurpose or delete)
stories.notes: Chose Path B (delete). Evidence: grep confirmed zero actual `from "@distill/shared"` imports anywhere in the monorepo — the apps/web dep + tsconfig path aliases + next.config.mjs transpilePackages entry were dead wiring; pricing constants in constants.ts and cost helpers in utils.ts had zero consumers. Path A would have moved SupportedLanguage/ContentType (used by 19 mcp-server files) out of the package that owns them into a shared package consumed by nobody. Deleted packages/shared/ entirely. Removed @distill/shared from apps/web/package.json, tsconfig.json paths (both @distill/shared and @distill/shared/*), next.config.mjs transpilePackages, and knip.jsonc (both ignoreWorkspaces and apps/web ignoreDependencies). CLAUDE.md monorepo structure updated — removed packages/shared and packages/ui lines (ui was already deleted per US-009), SupportedLanguage/ContentType location noted inline on mcp-server entry. CHANGELOG.md v0.9.1 draft documents the Path B decision. Automatically satisfies US-018's pricing-constants sub-task (PRD says delete if Path B taken). bun install refreshed lockfile (1 package removed). lint / check-types / build / knip all green. 3 workspace packages now (down from 4).

stories.title: Fix root layout lang attribute and update stale pricing
stories.notes: Hybrid approach per PRD unhappy-path: root app/layout.tsx hardcodes lang="fr" (the default locale per fumadocs-core i18n config), and a new SetHtmlLang client component in [lang]/layout.tsx updates document.documentElement.lang via useLayoutEffect when params.lang !== the static default. useLayoutEffect (not useEffect) ensures the update happens before paint, so /en/* routes don't flash lang="fr". The existing suppressHydrationWarning on <html> absorbs the expected server/client mismatch. [lang]/layout.tsx now accepts params: Promise<{ lang: string }> matching the Next 16 convention already in use by docs/layout.tsx. Pricing-constants sub-task (AC bullet 2) was already satisfied by US-017 Path B: packages/shared was entirely deleted. Files: apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx (1-char edit), apps/web/src/components/SetHtmlLang.tsx (new, 15 LOC), apps/web/src/app/[lang]/layout.tsx (params + SetHtmlLang render). lint / check-types / build / knip all green; build generates static pages for /fr/docs/* as expected.

stories.title: Add regression tests for all compressors
stories.notes: Added 7 new test files (generic, config, stacktrace, semantic, diff, conversation, multifile) + extended existing logs.test.ts with a US-019 regression block. Each file has 3+ tests covering positive/expected-shape, per-compressor compression-ratio floor, and unhappy-path (empty/whitespace/malformed/bounded-large input never throws). Curated snapshot-style fixtures live under src/compressors/__fixtures__/{logs,stacktrace,diff,config}/. Snapshot assertions target small deliberate shape fragments (omittedInfo markers, summary block structure, shared-imports block) not full compressed bodies — shape drift forces review, cosmetic fixes don't cascade. Per-compressor ratio floors chosen by content type: logs ≤60%, stacktrace ≤65%, config ≤85%, generic ≤80%, semantic ≤75%, diff hunks-only ≤90% / summary ≤70%, conversation key-extraction ≤55%, multifile skeleton ≤85%. Side-effect: removed stray `export default semanticCompressor;` from semantic.ts (duplicate of the named const export; zero consumers). Coverage on src/compressors/** lifted from baseline to 83.15% lines / 65.71% branches / 83.20% functions / 82.35% statements — comfortably above PRD's 75% lines floor. Global coverage also improved: 71.80% lines (was 66.55% per US-011 baseline), all global thresholds cleared. 44 new tests, 1045 total tests pass; typecheck/lint/build/knip all green.
